summary: Completed read-only audit focused on Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook registration/runtime parity. Found that the repo registers Claude settings and MCP, but Claude runtime proof is registration-only; the shared hook runtime remains Codex-labeled and no verifier executes a Claude-shaped hook input through the Claude registration path.
decisions: No source files were edited per read-only audit scope.
Treat current Claude UserPromptSubmit support as installed-registration parity, not runtime-proof parity.

The most direct failing verifier should execute the Claude settings hook command with official Claude UserPromptSubmit JSON and assert Claude-labeled events/reports, which currently fail because the runtime hardcodes codex_prompt_submitted/codex_preflight_completed and codex_hook.
next_steps: Add a Claude-specific hook verifier before claiming closed-loop proof for any Claude Code session.
Refactor the shared hook runtime to derive host/source labels from input or environment and emit claude_code_hook / claude_preflight_* evidence when invoked by Claude.
Extend verify:os to include Claude hook command existence/execution and hook-disable policy checks when Claude prompt hook is required.
search_queries: Claude Code hooks UserPromptSubmit JSON input schema official documentation
docs Anthropic Claude Code hooks UserPromptSubmit matcher hooks command timeout
